statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); session=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_name // empty'); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); s=''; [ -n "$session" ] && s+="\033[38;5;141m󰭹 $session\033[0m "; s+="\033[38;5;39m \033[0m \033[38;5;45m$dir\033[0m "; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo detached); if ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then s+="\033[38;5;220m $branch±\033[0m"; else s+="\033[38;5;76m $branch\033[0m"; fi; fi; echo -e "$s"
